headline: Paws Across Asia: Agoda Reveals Six Under-the-Radar Destinations for Pet-Friendly Travel
summary: Travel with a furry companion in tow is no longer a niche pursuit, but a rapidly-growing trend reshaping how people explore Asia. Fuelled by remote and flexible work, a redefinition of family that now firmly includes pets, and new animal-centric accommodations, cafés, and attractions, "pawrents" are increasingly refusing to leave their companions behind. To help travellers plan their next adventure, Agoda has rounded up six of Asia's most pet-friendly, yet wonderfully uncrowded, destinations.
